title: Chief Kozlov's Oxygen Inventory
description: A handwritten note in Kozlov's pocket, folded twice: 'KO2 canisters remaining: 7. Consumption rate at current crew density: 1 per 13 minutes. Time to critical threshold (Cabin_Oxygen below 20): approximately 91 minutes from 20:00.' The math is done in the margins, checked twice. Kozlov knows exactly how long the crew has before the oxygen situation makes rational decision-making impossible. He has not shared this calculation with the officers.
